title: Iceberg wrong total number of rows after two deletes
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1 (c1 INT, c2 TEXT, c3 FLOAT8);
INSERT INTO t1 (c1, c2, c3) VALUES (1, 'test', NULL);
CREATE TABLE t2 (c4 TIMESTAMP, c5 INT DEFAULT 0);
key_bug_features: Incorrect total rows after multiple deletes in Iceberg
